center.name: 马赛马拉
center.summary: 马赛马拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括棕颈歌百灵、Maasai apalis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Places where it is found include Songwe, Arusha, Tabora, Maasai Mara, and the Serengeti. The species is only found in patches of whistling thorn that are very tall and dense

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tropicalis in the Maasai Mara, Kenya]] The rufous-naped lark is found in many parts of sub-Saharan Africa
